questions.q: Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders held a special meeting on April 23, 2026, to vote on a proposed $110 billion mega-merger with which media company?
A decade after winning the Premier League title, which football club was officially relegated to League One following a 2-2 draw with Hull City in April 2026?
Who was announced on April 23, 2026, as the Jury President for the 83rd Venice International Film Festival?
It was officially confirmed that Michael B. Jordan and Austin Butler will star as Tubbs and Crockett in the period-piece reboot 'Miami Vice '85'. Which director is helming the project?
Which Utah Mammoth player scored a late goal to beat the Vegas Golden Knights 3-2 and even their first-round playoff series in April 2026?

A ProPublica investigation published on April 23, 2026, revealed that fewer than half of the 140,000 opioid victims who filed claims will receive compensation from which pharmaceutical company's $7.4 billion settlement?

According to a scientific statement released by the American Heart Association on April 23, 2026, physical activity may be safer than previously thought for children diagnosed with what specific heart muscle disorder?
What New England Patriots coach announced on April 23, 2026, that he is seeking counseling and will miss Day 3 of the NFL Draft?
On April 23, 2026, Netflix authorized a massive new stock buyback program to help boost its share price. How much was authorized for this repurchase?

On April 23, 2026, it was reported that U.S. health officials halted the publication of a CDC study analyzing the effectiveness of which vaccine in preventing adult emergency room visits and hospitalizations?
